summary: Tested Custom Order API, Mockup Routes, and Frontend UI for iteration 189. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend tests verified: (1) User login and /mira dashboard, (2) Celebrate page with Soul Picks for Mojo (Indie breed), (3) Product modal with 'Customise with Mojo's Photo' button visible, (4) Admin panel with Soul Products > AI Mockups tab showing 3070/3826 mockups.
critical_code_review_comments: Custom Order API correctly creates orders in 'custom_orders' collection and service desk tickets in 'service_desk_tickets' collection
Photo upload endpoint validates file type (only images) and file size (max 10MB)
Breed products API correctly filters by breed and pillar, including 'all' breed products
AI Mockups tab shows 3070/3826 products with mockups (80% completion)
Console shows 'Soul data not available: TypeError: Failed to fetch' on some pages - this is a non-blocking warning related to soul data fetch timing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 189 tested Custom Order WOW feature and AI Mockup routes. All APIs working: POST/GET/PATCH /api/custom-orders, GET /api/mockups/breed-products with breed+pillar filters, GET /api/mockups/mockup-gen-status, GET /api/mockups/pillar-assign-status. Frontend verified: Soul Picks modal shows 14 Indie products for Mojo, 'Customise with Mojo's Photo' button appears in product detail modal. Admin panel Soul Products > AI Mockups tab accessible showing 3070/3826 mockups. Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123, pet: Mojo (Indie breed). Admin: aditya/lola4304.
